Name: XdrLogRaider
Author: Alex Kefallonitis - al.kefallonitis@gmail.com
Description:
The **XdrLogRaider** solution is an open-source, community data connector for Microsoft Defender XDR portal-internal `/apiproxy/*` audit and reporting endpoints. It ingests Defender XDR events into per-Category custom Log Analytics tables (`Defender__CL`) with one typed row per event and the raw JSON preserved, using dynamic per-tenant capability discovery. **Underlying Microsoft technologies used:** a. [Azure Functions](https://azure.microsoft.com/services/functions/#overview) (self-hosted PowerShell Function App in your subscription) b. [Data Collection Rules and Endpoints](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/data-collection-rule-overview)

NOTE: This connector authenticates to and reads from Microsoft Defender XDR portal-internal /apiproxy/* endpoints, which are undocumented and unsupported and may change or break without notice. XdrLogRaider is a community, non-Microsoft project; it is read-only by design and intended for authorized use within your own tenant. Authentication uses a dedicated Entra service account with TOTP or Passkey MFA and transparent SSO refresh. See the project repository for the full data-source, authentication, and security model.
